I have permit-ready architectural drawings for a steel building complex in Alabama and now need the foundation portion engineered, detailed, and sealed by a Professional Engineer licensed in the state.

The structure includes:
• 65' × 130' enclosed storage / shop area built in pre-engineered steel
• 65' × 16' open lean-to on one gable end
• 37' × 70' steel frame living quarters attached to one side of the

compliance.disclaimer: This output is AI-assisted and requires verification by a licensed Professional Engineer before use in any engineering design, permit submission, or construction activity.
